magicFill.title: Magic Fill
magicFill.description: Confirm items from the "Scan" tab, then press the button below to auto-fill the customs form.
magicFill.noData: No confirmed items yet — go to the "Scan" tab to scan and confirm items first.
magicFill.noTab: No active tab found — please open a customs declaration page first.
magicFill.cannotConnect: Cannot connect to the web page — please open a customs declaration page first.

scan.title: Scan & Review
scan.noItems: No items yet — scan a PDF to extract data
scan.goToMagicFill: Confirmed — go to "Magic Fill" tab to fill the form

chat.placeholder: Ask about HS codes, FTA, regulations...
chat.emptyTitle: Ask about customs regulations, HS codes, or FTA rates
chat.loginFirst: Please login to VOLLOS backend first
chat.greeting:
Hello! I'm VOLLOS AI, your customs assistant.

I can help with:
• HS Code classification
• MFN / FTA duty rates
• Import-export regulations
• Licenses / controlled goods

Feel free to ask!
chat.thanksReply: You're welcome! Feel free to ask anything else.
chat.chitchatReply: I specialize in customs topics. Try asking about HS Codes, duty rates, FTA, or import-export regulations!

banner.midRateNote: Mid Rate — used for customs duty calculation
